channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The pope moves to police AI
item.description: The Vatican is racing to build digital defenses for the artificial intelligence era — and quietly positioning itself as a global referee of what's rea...

item.title: ICE detention center expansion sparks national protest
item.description: The push to block ICE's plans to expand detention centers is fueling a coordinated national day of protests on Saturday. Why it matters: No Kings prot...

item.title: Trump's surge in oil exports during Iran war will hit a ceiling
item.description: The bottling up of Middle East oil is giving a lift to U.S. exports, but there are real limits on how much more they can grow. Why it matters: Preside...

item.title: Mike Johnson faces "hell week" as Republicans defy Trump
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson is staring down a brutal pre-recess session next week as he tries to cram three high-stakes votes through a fractured confe...

item.title: DeSantis plots end run of Florida law to create more GOP House seats
item.description: Florida bans lawmakers from intentionally creating congressional seats to give their party an advantage. But Gov. Ron DeSantis quietly has launched a ...

item.title: Canada’s prime minister says economic ties with US are a weakness that must be corrected
item.description: “We have to take care of ourselves because we can’t rely on one foreign partner,” Mark Carney said in a video address. “We can’t control the disruptio...

item.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken one risk after another that could have destabilized the American economy. Iran is the latest crisis to test U.S. econ...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills

item.description: ICE targets Charlotte, North Carolina due to the city’s mounting immigration problem. It is also the seat of Mecklenburg County which permits the sher...

item.title: Deterring Illegal Immigration: This Town Decided that Actions Speak Louder than Words
item.description: After approving an anti-sanctuary resolution, Worthington Hills, Kentucky is not a sanctuary for illegal aliens. To read the rest of the article click...

item.title: Chicago Mayor Dodges Question by Quibbling Over Term “Illegal Alien”
